query:
-- Real OAuth users
SELECT id, name, email, createdAt FROM users 
WHERE email NOT LIKE '%@example.com' 
  AND email NOT LIKE '%@ga-import.local'
  AND email NOT LIKE '%@anonymous.local'
  AND openId NOT LIKE 'device-%'
ORDER BY createdAt DESC;
